title: Get on your bike for Nieu-Bethesda 4 Day MTB Tour
description: NIEU-BETHESDA NEWS - Step into a world where...
bodyText: [{"type":"paragraph","text":"NIEU-BETHESDA NEWS - Step into a world where rugged beauty meets cultural charm - and where every turn of the pedal brings you closer to something extraordinary.","html":"NIEU-BETHESDA NEWS - Step into a world where rugged beauty meets cultural charm - and where every turn of the pedal brings you closer to something extraordinary."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"The Nieu-Bethesda 4 Day MTB Tour takes you through the soul of the Karoo, where wide-open skies, weathered jeep tracks, and endless valleys paint a picture of wild South African splendour."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Ride past ancient fossils, over rolling farmland, and through the quiet magic of one of the country's most iconic small towns.","html":"Ride past ancient fossils, over rolling farmland, and through the quiet magic of one of the country's most iconic small towns."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Expect breathtaking climbs, rewarding descents, and stories you'll tell long after the dust settles.","html":"Expect breathtaking climbs, rewarding descents, and stories you'll tell long after the dust settles."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Bikers from all over the country are invited to join the Nieu-Bethesda 4 Day MTB TriSport Boutique Tours which will be hosted from 14 to 19 April, and 19 to 24 April, offering distances of 61km, 38km and 54km.","html":"Bikers from all over the country are invited to join the Nieu-Bethesda 4 Day MTB TriSport Boutique Tours which will be hosted from 14 to 19 April, and 19 to 24 April, offering distances of 61km, 38km and 54km."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Details for registration are now available at www.trisport.co.za/nieu-bethesda-4-day-mtb-tour-2. For group bookings, send an email to [email protected].","html":"Details for registration are now available at www.trisport.co.za/nieu-bethesda-4-day-mtb-tour-2. For group bookings, send an email to [email protected]."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"E-bikes will be most welcome.","html":"E-bikes will be most welcome."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Only 18 riders per tour can be accommodated.","html":"Only 18 riders per tour can be accommodated."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"This tour is for those who crave more than just the ride - it's for riders who want connection, scenery, and a journey with heart.","html":"This tour is for those who crave more than just the ride - it's for riders who want connection, scenery, and a journey with heart."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"}]

images.alt: Get on your bike for Nieu-Bethesda 4 Day MTB Tour
